entry.title: Stop requirement transfer when sales order is in approval
entry.content:
Background

Workflows are a series of predefined steps that can help B2B businesses improve efficiency, enhance the customer experience, and achieve business goals.

In SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud, we have quite flexible workflow features available for sales document. Please check detail in SAP help.

Basically a sales document cannot be processed further when it is in approval, e.g. updating sales document, creating subsequent documents, etc. However, some customers complaint that the requirement has already been transferred to MRP in spite of that sales order is in approval. From business perspective it is risky if production department takes requirement into consideration while the sales order is eventually rejected by approver.

Unfortunately, there is no such flexibility in SAP standard workflow feature in sales order to control requirement transfer. This would be planned into roadmap for long term planning. This blogs shows a workaround of how to avoid requirement transfer if a sales order is in approval.

Business Example

Selling company ABC is producing certain material and sell it to various buyers. The company ABC has enabled workflow for sales orders. According to business process definition, the sales order is fully blocked from any business processes before sales order is approved, including:

  1. sales order cannot be updated when it is in approval
  2. outbound delivery and billing document cannot be created from the sales order
  3. the customer's demand shall not be confirmed to customers
  4. requirement shall not be transferred to MRP process

Solution

The point A and B in above list from customer's expectation are already covered by SAP standard approval process.

The point C is covered by new feature delivered since CE2402 to control confirmed quantity in sales order approval process, see detail in SAP help.

Unfortunately, there is no standard solution to fulfill point D to avoid transferring requirement to MRP when sales order is in approval. There is a workaround to achieve customer's expectation with some manual steps. This blogs shows how point C and point D are fulfilled in sales order approval process.

Configuration in Approval Request Reason Code

Go to SSCUI 102751 to enable setting "Set Confirmed Quantities to Zero" for specific approval request reason code.

Workflow Enablement

There are some steps needed to enable workflow on sales order. This is not the focus in this blog, please check more information SAP help, or refer to the blog to configure flexible workflow in sales document.

Business Process Testing

When a sales order is in approval with this specific approval request ID, the confirmed quantity will be set to zero automatically.

Save the SSCUI setting and then create a sales order. Make sure the sales order is in approval with approval request reason ID "ZY01".

Go to schedule line and the confirmed quantity is 0.

But now the requirement was already available in stock/requirement list.

In order to make sure the requirement is not transferred to MRP, you have to open sales order and set the flag "Fixed Date and Qty" in sales order item level, and then re-trigger approval process.

Because currently the sales order is still in approval and cannot be changed, go to sales order app and press button to withdraw approval request.

After the approval is withdrawn, change the sales order and check the indicator "Fixed Date and Qty".

The sales is set to in approval after the sales order is saved.

Now, if you check the stock/requirement list again, the requirement of sales order 20457 disappears from the list.

Conclusion

This is only a workaround to not transfer sales order requirement to MRP when sales order is in approval. Providing more flexibility in sales order workflow is also planned in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud roadmap. Please stay tuned on upcoming product updates.

entry.title: Re: List of deletion flag material
entry.content: Table MARA only shares information of deletion per client levels, not all levels

entry.title: Re: HOW to create a custom LOGIN page in CAPM in sap BTP
entry.content: Thanks @WouterLemaire sir , i have added customized CSS in Idp login page by following your guidance, additionally I followed this article which helps me in customizing tenent text https://github.com/SAP-docs/btp-cloud-identity-services/blob/main/docs/Operation-Guide/configure-idp-initiated-sso-5d59caa.md , But is it is possible that i can use my own login page instead of using Idp default login page.

entry.title: Re: Welcome to the beginner corner!
entry.content:
Hi @David_Chaviano 

I’m Fiza, and I’m excited to share that my recent exploration of data analytics has led me to SAP—a platform that perfectly aligns with my passion for data-driven decision-making. With a background in business administration, I’ve always been fascinated by the ways data can transform strategy and impact outcomes. Learning about SAP’s capabilities, particularly in planning and financial management, has truly inspired me to dive deeper.

The vast array of tools and solutions that SAP offers is remarkable, and I’m excited about the potential to harness these skills through certification. I see SAP as a pivotal tool for shaping smarter business strategies, and certification through the SAP Digital Skills Initiative feels like the perfect next step to launch my career in this direction.

I’m eager to start this journey and ultimately make a meaningful contribution to the field by using SAP to drive impact change. Thank you for this incredible opportunity to learn, grow, and make a difference.

Best regards,
Fiza

entry.title: Re: List of deletion flag material
entry.content: Display Materials flagged for Deletion under Settings does not exist

entry.title: BADI for Journal entry item (Changing parameter: WBSE Element)
entry.content:
Do we have any BADI available for below scenario :

Using Journal Entry app , users will create Journal entries with reference to Billing doc .(Statistical condition maintained). In item level we need to change the WBS element field value to the amount maintained in that statistical condition.

We can't find any BADI related to journal entry with changing parameter WBSE element.

we tried substitution rules too, there also we dont have wbse element as target field

 

OR do we have any other way to execute this scenario in public cloud?

FIN Cost Object Controlling SAP S/4HANA Cloud Extensibility

entry.title: Re: How to create BRF+ for SAP21 FI Customer Invoice in S4HANA Public cloud?
entry.content: Hello, your question has been forwarded to the experts. We hope to provide an answer soon. Kind regards, Anne

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content: Excellent initiative! Really helpful for newcomers. @David_Chaviano

entry.title: Re: BADI for Journal entry item (Changing parameter: WBSE Element)
entry.content: Adding further, how can we add WBSE field in substitution target field?

entry.title: Re: HANA failed to start after updating to SLES 15 SP6 from SLES 15 SP5
entry.content: see next comment.

entry.title: Re: HANA failed to start after updating to SLES 15 SP6 from SLES 15 SP5
entry.content: You need to look at the namerserver trace to understand why the nameserver exited. However, I just checked the relevant SAP Note 2235581 and there it is mentioned that SLES 15 SP6 is only supported starting revision 59.12 but you are on 59.04. Before looking further, you should update your HDB version and then test again.

entry.title: Re: CL SALV aggregation doesn't work
entry.content:
It doesn't concern your total issue.

What it means:

entry.title: Frequent Unavailability of HANA Cloud Database Services on SAP BTP Trial Account
entry.content:
Hello SAP Support Team,

I am currently working on a POC application using the SAP BTP Trial Account. Over the past two weeks, I have frequently encountered unavailability issues with the HANA Cloud Database services.

I understand that, due to the nature of the trial account, the database services stop daily and require manual restarting.

Could you please inform me where I can find the maintenance schedule for the BTP Trial Account? As I am based in India, the services often go down during our daytime.

 

Regards

Rahul Jain

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I trust this message meets you well. I am happy to share I have finished the course on SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition offered through Digital Skills Initiative.

I am particularly thankful for this program as a guy who wants to learn and get some experience in SAP technology because it helps people like me, where one does not have money enough to try the certification once on my own. This type of opportunity is crucial in assisting me to move onto the next step in my career.

SAP Community Username: 2200031450cseh@gmail.com. Please provide my application process the redemption code which will help me on set up exam for some SAP certification.

Thanks for this great opportunity.

entry.title: How Fetch Highlighted Rows from a SAP Table
entry.content:
Hi,

Just wanted to ask how to fetch data rows from SAP table (type of GuiTableControl).

I want to fetch the values for the highlighted/selected rows only and save it to a DataTable.

Example of the reference SAP Table where I only want to grab the data for row 2 & 3 (the selected rows).


But I don't know what property to achieve the "IsHighlighted" logic below.

using System;
using System.Data;
using SAPFEWSELib;

class Program
{
    static void Main()
    {
        GuiTableControl SapTable = (GuiTableControl)session.FindById("your_tablecontrol_id");

        DataTable selectedRowsTable = new DataTable();
        selectedRowsTable.Columns.Add("Column1", typeof(string));
        selectedRowsTable.Columns.Add("Column2", typeof(string));

        for (int rowIndex = 0; rowIndex < SapTable.RowCount; rowIndex++)
        {
            if (IsHighlighted(rowIndex))  // Todo: How to detect if highlighted
            {
                DataRow newRow = selectedRowsTable.NewRow();
                newRow["Column1"] = SapTable.GetCellValue(rowIndex, "Column1");
                newRow["Column2"] = SapTable.GetCellValue(rowIndex, "Column2");
                selectedRowsTable.Rows.Add(newRow); // Add only highlighted rows
            }
        }

        foreach (DataRow row in selectedRowsTable.Rows)
        {
            Console.WriteLine($"{row["Column1"]}, {row["Column2"]}");
        }
    }

    
}

entry.title: Re: Welcome to the beginner corner!
entry.content:
Hi @David_Chaviano 

I hope this message finds you well.

I am a recent MBA graduate with a specialization in Management Information Systems, and I am eager to expand my expertise in SAP, particularly aiming to become an SAP Certified Consultant in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud.

Having successfully completed the learning journeys relevant to this area, I am now keen to further enhance my skills and knowledge as I prepare for the certification process.

As I embark on this next step, I kindly request your support in the form of a voucher to assist with the associated costs. Your consideration of my request would be greatly appreciated, and I look forward to your positive response.

Thank you for your time and support.

Best regards,
Naveera Shariq

entry.title: Re: Customer has issues accessing SAP SQL Anywhere 17 EBF...
entry.content:
try this link, it's the list of all EBFs for SQLA 17:
https://me.sap.com/softwarecenter/template/products/_APP=00200682500000001943&_EVENT=NEXT&HEADER=Y&FUNCTIONBAR=Y&EVENT=TREE&NE=NAVIGATE&ENR=67837800100900008965&V=MAINT

entry.title: Why does ABAP quick fix put all the words in new line including the where condition?
entry.content:
Hello all,

After converting from ECC EHP8 to S/4 HANA 2023 we are using the ABAP quick fix and recommended quick fix. I found some difference between 'Recommended quick fix' vs Quick fix.

After Quick fix:

Problem statement:

All fields are moved one below the other; even the 'Where' condition statement! Pretty Printer is also not applied.

After Recommended quick fix: 

The code being replaced is neatly commented with information on what is replaced. Also Pretty Printer is applied.

Am I missing any setting in ADT to enable pretty printer for Quick fix?

Also, i'm able to do 'Recommended Quick fix' only in ATC Problems view. Not in Problems view. 

BR,

Ajay Mukundan

entry.title: Re: B1iF Message Failure: Outbound FIE001 basePath or pat...
entry.content: To test the issue, please try starting the SAP Integration Service using a different user account. The Local System account has only local permissions and cannot access network paths. By running the service under an account with the necessary network permissions, you may resolve the access problem.

Can you please test this in the 64bit Outlook., as windows 11 is a 64bit OS

You can uninstall 32bit version then install 64bit and perform the test and let us know the results .

Kind Regards
Nidhi Singh

entry.title: Re: CDN Integration with SAP Commerce Cloud

@joris_quenee, thanks for this introduction, another question about CDN is that does the CDN would impact the personalization function if no special configuration in the CDN, that means using URL as the cache key in CDN. 

For example, user A access the home page and the cache key is /electronics-spa/en/USD/, if the content is cached by CDN, when user B access the home page, use the cached content directly, the personalization component for user B is missing or not?

Try with type P instead of I.

entry.title: Re: Login Failed after upgrade from FP18 to FP20 PL03
entry.content: We tried with two different user accounts and both shows Login Failed. We upgraded a POS client, and after we have full synced the users we are also receicing the message "You do not have the Permission to access any UI Screen".

entry.title: No dunning date set for direct debit customer
entry.content:
Hi,

I implemented BTE 00001060 using note 3182278 to include customers with direct debit in the dunning run.
But after reviewing the dunned document the dunning date and dunning level are missing:

This is how I implemented the function module:

 

FUNCTION z_fi_fm_bte_interface_00001060.
  c_xzalb = space.
ENDFUNCTION.

 

After a dunning run with transaction F150 the document 10019053/2024 is correctly listed in the log:

> Account D 0014000315 has a payment method for incoming payments                      FM 805 S
> Account D 0014000315 read items: 1                                                   FM 803 S
>     Processing and completing dunning lines ------- Phase I ---                      FM 818 S
> Document 0010019053/2024/001 has new dunning level 1.                                FM 831 S
>     Check legal dunning procedure and credit memos --- Phase II -                    FM 822 S
>     Minimum charges and dunning interest ----------- Phase III --                    FM 817 S
>     Generate dunning data ------------------------- Phase IV --                      FM 816 S
...
> Dunning level 1 is used for account D 0014000315                                     FM 811 S
>     Document 0010019053/2024/001: Dunning level 1, days in arrears 60, status <.Dpi> FM 834 S
> Account D 0014000315 dunning data has been generated.                                FM 806 S

Message FM834 states that the document has now dunning level 1. The dunning notice is printed correctly.

What am I missing? What is necessary to set the dunning date and level for the document?

entry.title: Re: SCIM 2.0 API - User Provisioning - Bulk Operations (BulkRequest)
entry.content: My api samples for SAP Analytics Cloud uses the bulk operation. Please look at the samples that start with a '2' at https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/sap-analytics-cloud-user-and-team-provisioning-scim-api-sample-scripts/ba-p/13572651

entry.title: Re: cannot get document details in SAP Business One mobile
entry.content:
Hi wiz_traceremo

Does issue happen with all sales orders or with specific one ?

When issue occurs, can you see any error in B1if -> Monitoring -> Message log ?

This issue is not reported in latest version of SAP Business One so please confirm the version of SAP Business One you are using ?

Kind Regards
Nidhi

entry.title: Is there an API to clear notated items and record advance payments in S4HANA Public cloud?
entry.content:
Hello experts.
I want to use API to post journal entry for advance receipt.

We believe that the best way to clear general AR documents is to use "Journal Entry - Clearing (Asynchronous)".
However, I'm not sure if you can clear the noted items using this API.

What API can I use to write off the noted items and account for the advance?

entry.title: Re: CDS Annotation: Dynamically hide a line_item
entry.content:
Even I tried the same thing for one of my poc. It didn't worked for me. I think EDM are static and cannot be made dynamically.

I achieved the functionality through frontend creating the columns dynamically in onInit() function.

entry.title: Re: SCIM 2.0 API - User Provisioning - Bulk Operations (B...
entry.content:
My api samples for SAP Analytics Cloud uses the bulk operation. Please look at the samples that start with a '2' at https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/sap-analytics-cloud-user-and-team-provisioning-scim-api-sample-scripts/ba-p/13572651

 

The samples are currently for SAP Analytics Cloud but the syntax is the same for Datasphere. I will be adding Datasphere examples and those will start with a '3'. 

 

You'll find in those samples my suggested way to manage errors. The user guide for my samples also explains how the bulk operations work. 

In short your syntax is slightly out. 

All the best Matthew

entry.title: Re: Build Apps Preview Editable not working
entry.content: I believe it is a bug and development is working on it with urgency, and perhaps it will be fixed next week but I don't know for sure. I had the same problem, as I mentioned in my previous post.

entry.title: Re: Supersonic javascript component not working in apk build?
entry.content: Hi, sorry to hear that you are facing this issue. Could you export your app to allow us to study this further? If possible, please send the exported app to our email SAPBuildAppsSupport@sap.com.

entry.title: Re: CL SALV aggregation doesn't work
entry.content: I copied your code and it worked on my ECC and S/4HANA systems, can you check that you didn't define a default display variant and/or execute the ALV consistency check on your system?

entry.title: Re: Add new folder tabs to BP form - B1 crashed when I cl...
entry.content:
Hi Akhil626,

Please help to check this issue in SP2408 for SAP Business One version 10.0.

The similar issue was fixed in that patch which is documented in SAP Note 2194583.

Kind regards,

ANKIT CHAUHAN

SAP Business One Support

entry.title: Re: Submit with internal table
entry.content:
'Former User' are, as their name implies, no longuer active.

Better ask your own question or perform some search.

  • INDX is a database table, a data cluster, read Abap online documentation on it (used in EXPORT/IMPORT statements)
  • You could also use many kinds of data (An internal table for example) in a parameter as soon it's defined with NO-DISPLAY

entry.title: Re: New Sandbox Available on the SAP Learning Site to Practice Hands-on
entry.content: i cant login? why

entry.title: CDS Data Model for Analytical List Page
entry.content:
Dear experts,

I am trying to develop the Analytical List Page. I created CDS Data Model with Analytics annotations and I am exposing it via Odata V2 Service Binding. Unfortunately, as long as I keep the annotation @analytics.query: true in my C-View, I am getting an error in App preview: Fetch API (direct DB access) is not supported for entity

Unfortunately, exposing my C-View directly using @odata.publish: true as suggested in this blog is not an option, as our ABAP Language Version is ABAP for Cloud Development, this is not allowed.

Is there a way around this?

Best regards,
Radek

entry.title: Universe handling for similar universes with different connections.
entry.content:
I have a universe that I maintain in the IDT. Due to different authorizations, I need the universe twice with different connections.

I have now created these and received CUID xy and vw. Now the first major changes are due. How can I prevent having to make the adjustments twice?

Problem: If I make the adjustments to the universe with the CUID xy, then copy it and adjust the connection, I don't automatically have the CUID vw again. The dirty way would be to simply change the CUID of the second universe in the CMS database back to vw.

Isn't there a more elegant way? Updating the existing universes individually each time is too much work for me. Many thanks for the ideas!

entry.title: Re: How Refresh POD after trigger a production Process
entry.content: Thank's Manoel! i completely missed this option

entry.title: Re: How to retrieve *day by day* EmployeeTime info via API
entry.content: FWIW, I figured out a solution in SCI. I started with EmployeeTime (which retrieved absences and attendances), and then used a Content Enricher to retrieve the EmployeeTimeCalendar for the absences in the EmployeeTime payload (keyed by the EmployeeTime externalCode). Then I used XSLT to restructure each EmployeeTimeCalendar entry into a separate EmployeeTime node, leaving me with a day by day breakdown of all attendances and absences.

entry.title: Re: How to create Row level Security on user groups in Da...
entry.content:
Hi,

Is there a way to assign the Dac object so the row level security to user groups ? 

Sure, you can create one local table for the user/user group assignment and another table for the user group/row security assignments and then join the 2 tables in a view which will be used in your DAC.

Is there a way to create row level security for a list of values like hierarchy nodes or list of distinct values withouth duplicating rows ?  

I think what you are looking for are the Operators and values and Hierarchy Data Access Control features.

Best regards,

Clément

entry.title: Re: CDN Integration with SAP Commerce Cloud
entry.content:
@baogang20 It is valid remark. Natively CMS OCC API is not supporting CDN caching. As you well understand, if you do that, you will lost personnalisation. To improve that, you can do a customization to expose user segment/profil on API URL to get a key useable by CDN.

However SSR caching is supported and it won't impact personalization feature. Then CSR rehydratation can fetch/load personalized content.

entry.title: After manager's rating gets auto populated, manager should be able to change the same rating.
entry.content:
In the "Add Goal" section, there are two fields: Target and Actual. When the manager enters a value in the Target field and then in the Actual field, the rating for that goal is automatically populated based on the formula configured in the backend.

The rating in the form is also automatically populated based on the auto-populated rating, as illustrated in the screenshot below.

My question is: Is there an option to make the star rating editable, allowing the manager to modify it even after it has been auto-populated?

entry.title: Re: How to Read User Details and User Groups Assigned in...
entry.content:
In CAP you can get the SAML or openID attributes that you received when authenticating through the api in CAP:  Authentication | capire (cloud.sap)

If you need more details you can try option 4 in this blog post: Show current user details in Cloud Foundry apps wi... - SAP Community

In the meanwhile, there is a new api in IAS but the idea would be the same.

entry.title: Re: Writing Table data to csv or text file in SAP Datasphere
entry.content: Excel / File Export is not the Target of the DSP 😉

entry.title: Re: DRF - Business Partner replication - disable confirmation message
entry.content:
Hi,
If you disable the confirmation message, the system is unable to create key mapping. This creates severe data inconsistencies which will sooner or later cause undesired data replication such as inconsistent master data, duplicates, data loss, etc.
It is not really advisable to disable the confirmation message.
Best regards
Michael

entry.title: Re: HOW to create a custom LOGIN page in CAPM in sap BTP
entry.content: I think yes but you'll have to handle everything related to security yourself. I wouldn't recommend doing this. CIS doesn't come with a high cost so it would be cheaper to just activate CIS instead of developing your own login page.

entry.title: Re: DRF - Business Partner replication - disable confirma...
entry.content:
If you disable the confirmation message, the system is unable to create key mapping. This creates severe data inconsistencies which will sooner or later cause undesired data replication such as inconsistent master data, duplicates, data loss, etc.
It is not really advisable to disable the confirmation message.
Best regards
Michael

entry.title: Re: SAP Ariba Intake Management: A Seamless, User-Centric Solution with Powerful Extensibility
entry.content: Thanks for the info @rh131 👍

entry.title: where to get best 3d products
entry.content: im wondering to found best 3d product congirator just found a site does anyone used the Konfi Gear site before?

entry.title: Re: Kyma Capacity Units Calculation
entry.content:
Hi Simon,

Kyma is billed on an hourly basis.

What it implies is that if you enable a Kyma runtime and use it for let's say 10 hours and disable it afterward, you will be charged for those 10 hours and not for a full month.

Disabling implies that the Kyma runtime instance is unprovisioned, it is totally gone and start new next time you enable Kyma. So you won't be disabling your production environments or environments which you would like to run continuously, and they will be running for 720 hours.

However, for some dev scenarios, you might like to provision a Kyma runtime, try / test something out and then unprovisioned it. For such scenarios, it might make sense to only pay for the short period when you had Kyma enabled.

You can also check the help.sap.com link https://help.sap.com/docs/btp/sap-business-technology-platform/commercial-information-for-sap-btp-kyma-runtime for further information.

Hope it helps.

Thanks,

Gaurav

entry.title: Re: New Sandbox Available on the SAP Learning Site to Practice Hands-on
entry.content: Hello @Neal_Catena, that is unfortunately not possible.

entry.title: Re: New Sandbox Available on the SAP Learning Site to Practice Hands-on
entry.content: Hello @Marie2212, do you have a Learning Hub subscription? To which Sandbox can you not log on?

entry.title: How to manually process the SM58 records in the case of any issues
entry.content:
Hi all,

There are some cases wherein the TRFC (Transaction SM58) records keep processing yet growing in the count.

It may be due to an underlying system issue (which we need to check with the Administration team) but as a workaround, how can these be manually processed?

I have tried to use the option to execute the records in bulk (in such scenarios) in the background mode using the option available in the menu but that doesn't seem to help much (possibly because the previous records are still being executed then).

Can anyone please share their suggestions.

Thanks in advance.

Prashant

entry.title: Re: Transports and remote client copy
entry.content:
Wrong tag, btw – Transportation Management is about freight / physical goods, not to be confused with Transport Organizer (CTS).

(I'll get my coat)

entry.title: Re: after unsuccessful authentication
entry.content:
@jerryjanda 

Hi Jerry,

it was working fine yesterday but today I at first had troubles as my - correctly entered - password wasn't accepted during login via Firefox a couple of times. With the 4th or 5th try it was finally accepted but then the "Authentification Unsuccessful" message was displayed yet again. But I was logged in regardless and could access my notifications and - obviously! - write this response.

Cheers

Bärbel

entry.title: SAP Build Process Automation - Environments October Update
entry.content:
Dear Community,

Few months ago we introduced the Environments in this article. We've just released a significant update with the support of the following artifacts:

  • Process
  • Decision
  • Forms
  • Visibility Scenario

What it means for you?

You can now deploy a project containing a process within a Shared Environment. Only users who have access to a specific environment can use it. You can leverage the "Execute" privilege for enhancing the security and visibility of deployed Forms and Processes.

Two tabs have been added within the Control Tower > Environments for accessing Visibility Scenarios and Processes:

As explained before, now when deploying a new version, only the latest version will be seen as "active" within a Shared Environment. The behavior remains the same within the Public Environment.

For more details, our SAP Note has been updated with some useful information: https://me.sap.com/notes/3394899

entry.title: Unexpected OData Service Request with Incorrect Path After Deploying AppRouter
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I have deployed a full-stack project on SAP BTP using Cloud Foundry, and everything is working fine with my AppRouter. After deployment, I received the following URL for my AppRouter:

When I access this URL, it correctly redirects me to the welcome file (as specified in my AppRouter configuration), and my application (a SAP UI5 project) runs as expected. However, when inspecting the network traffic in the browser's console, I noticed that the app is attempting to fetch the following URL even though I haven't requested data from this service yet:

 

 

https://245509888trial-demo-fulldeploy.cfapps.us10000001.hana.ondemand.com/project125/odata/v4/library/

   project125 is the name of my UI5 application folder, which is inside the welcome file path in the                      AppRouter.

   library: is the base path for one of my OData services.

 

The issue is that this URL is returning a 404 status because the app seems to be appending the UI5 application path (project125) to the OData service URL (/odata/v4/library/), resulting in an incorrect URL: .../project125/odata/v4/library/.

My Questions are:

  1. Why is my AppRouter or UI5 app automatically appending the project125 path to the OData service URL when I haven't made any request to that service yet?
  2. How can I prevent the UI5 app from appending the project125 path to the service URL so that it fetches the correct path for the OData service?

 

 

this is my xs-app.json file  of my ui   project125.
 
 
{
  "welcomeFile": "/index.html",
  "authenticationMethod": "route",
  "routes": [
    {
      "source": "^/resources/(.*)$",
      "target": "/resources/$1",
      "authenticationType": "none",
      "destination": "ui5"
    },
    {
      "source": "^/test-resources/(.*)$",
      "target": "/test-resources/$1",
      "authenticationType": "none",
      "destination": "ui5"
    },
    {
      "source": "^(.*)$",
      "target": "$1",
      "service": "html5-apps-repo-rt",
      "authenticationType": "none"
    }
  ]
}
 
 
 
 
THis is my approuter     xs-app.json file  :
 
{
"authenticationMethod": "route",
"logout": {
    "logoutEndpoint": "/app-logout",
    "logoutPage": "/"
},
  "routes": [
    {
      "source": "^/app/(.*)$",
      "target": "$1",
      "localDir": ".",
      "cacheControl": "no-cache, no-store, must-revalidate"
    },
    {
      "source": "^/user-api(.*)",
      "target": "$1",
      "service": "sap-approuter-userapi"
  },
    {
      "source": "^/appconfig/",
      "localDir": ".",
      "cacheControl": "no-cache, no-store, must-revalidate"
    },
    {
      "source": "^/(.*)$",
      "target": "$1",
      "destination": "srv-api",
      "csrfProtection": true,
      "authenticationType": "none"
    }
  ],
  "welcomeFile": "/project125"
}
 
Any solutions  or suggestions on how to resolve this would be greatly appreciated!

entry.title: Re: CL SALV aggregation doesn't work
entry.content:
Also MENGE is usually a quantity field, so associated to a unit of measure field, add this uom field to the displayed structure (or define as a constant in field catalog) and insure the link is correct, so ALV will not sum add meters and litters.

  • CL_SALV_COLUMN->SET_QUANTITY or SET_QUANTITY_COLUMN

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content: SAP has done an incredible job by offering opportunities to learn SAP Public Cloud, making it a game-changer for students. It’s a fantastic way for students to get hands-on experience with the latest technology in the industry, giving them a real edge in their careers. With access to these learning resources, students can build valuable skills that are in high demand, making them better prepared for the job market. It’s a great chance for anyone looking to jumpstart their career in tech or cloud computing.

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hi @David_Chaviano ,

I am writing to express my strong interest in the SAP Digital Skills Initiative. As a E-commerce student with a background in SAP systems, I am eager to deepen my knowledge in SAP technologies and their application in optimizing business processes and improving operational efficiency.

This course represents a valuable opportunity for me to enhance my digital skills and gain practical experience in real-world scenarios. I am passionate about leveraging technology to drive business improvement and excited about the possibility of learning from this initiative.

Thank you for considering my application. I look forward to your response.

Best regards,
GiaHuy

Thank you in advance.

entry.title: How to create BRF+ for SAP21 FI Customer Invoice in S4HANA Public cloud?

Hi All ,

I am not able to view the Pdf format of  SAP21 FI Customer Invoice by using create correspondence tile.

these are the steps i was followed.

S1: I was copied the standard form template and then downloaded the copied form template.

sS2: after extracted the downloaded form template then made the changes in Adobe LiveCycle Designer and save the form and uploaded in the Maintain form template.

S3: maintain the CBC like below steps

S4: now providing the Output parameter determination

S5: now trying to create correspondence i am getting an error

 

Can anyone please explain did i miss any step or any configuration.

Thanks and Regards ,

Gowthami Gunji

entry.title: User Experience when migrating to S/4Hana Fashion
entry.content:
When users are migrated from AFS or FMS solution to S/4Hana Fashion, you need to take into account a few important points;

1. BOM creation complexities

2. Production order management

3. Article master related best practices.

4. Solution sizing on the cloud

entry.title: Re: How to know the list of interfaces in a ECC enviroment
entry.content: OK Thank you

entry.title: Multiple users should be able to provide ratings separately against each goal via get feedback.
entry.content:
Customer Expectation- The customer wishes to send the performance form to multiple evaluators using the "Get Feedback" feature in SF. However, there is a concern that all evaluators will provide ratings and comments for each goal and competency & ratings should not be overwritten; each user’s ratings must remain separate. For example, if there are five evaluators, there should be five distinct rating boxes for each of them.

Problem Statement- According to standard functionality of SF, standard rating can be provided to only one person from the workflow/ route-map which means there will be one single rating box for the manager as well as the get feedback person. If manager gives the rating & sends the form through get feedback option then the person is supposed to over write the ratings given by manager, while comments can be captured separately as per the product design. 

Kindly provide a solution to this issue. Is there any work around by which we can resolve this problem of capturing everyone's rating separately?

entry.title: Re: error M8147 Account determination for entry CPES PRD...
entry.content: If an error occurs when G/R posting, it may be because the evaluation class of the material master (accounting 1 view) is set incorrectly.

entry.title: Custom entity on public cloud RAP
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

I created a CDS based on a custom entity in SAP RAP cloud. I added a new button to this CDS. This button will perform an action on all records displayed on the screen. However, in the class I defined in the behavior, I cannot read the data on the screen. How can I do it?

entry.title: Restrict concurrent employment from SuccessFactors replication
entry.content:
Hi All

We need the concurrent employment function in SF but upon replicating the employee to HCM system using program: ECPAO_EE_ORG_REPL_QUERY, we need only the primary employment and the secondary employment should not be replicated.

Currently, when replicating the employee (who has both primary and secondary employment created in SF) to HCM system, we are getting below error “Pernr XXXXXX can't be used as it is already assigned to a different Userid XXXXX”.

Could not get any BAdI to restrict the secondary employment. Appreciate your suggestions.

 

Regards

Vinoth

entry.title: Re: Has anyone made a step-by-step tutorial for abap-plat...
entry.content:
Anser to myself.

I found that the current version on Github has a good guide for running the Docker container on windows:

SAP-docs/abap-platform-trial-image: End user documentation for ABAP Platform Trial image (github.com)

The FAQ gives info about how to set up SAPGui, but now clue about where to download and how to install SAPGui. The FAQ actually says "Install the SAP GUI that fits to your operating system, attached here", but nothing is attached, so I will raise a new question for that.

entry.title: A Leap Forward in Encryption: TLS 1.3 Support in S/4HANA
entry.content:
TLS is a cryptographic protocol designed to provide secure communication over a computer network. It is used to establish a secure connection between a client and a server to ensure that the data exchanged is private and reliable.

The Benefits of TLS 1.3

The introduction of TLS1.3 in SAP S/4HANA 2023 brings several benefits designed to enhance security and streamline processes:

  1. Simplified and stronger cipher suites: TLS 1.3 removes support for outdated and potentially insecure algorithms and ciphers, focusing on a more streamlined and secure set. This simplification reduces the potential for misconfigurations and vulnerabilities while strengthening the overall security posture of your communications.
  2. Perfect Forward Secrecy (PFS) always enabled: With PFS enabled, each TLS session has a unique session key which cannot be recovered by learning the private key, ensuring that your session keys will not be compromised even if the server's private key is. In TLS1.3, PFS is always enabled, enhancing the confidentiality of your data.
  3. Simplified key exchange: TLS 1.3 only supports Diffie-Hellman type key exchange algorithms, removing support for RSA key exchange. This simplifies the key exchange process and eliminates potential vulnerabilities associated with RSA key exchange.

How to Configure TLS 1.3 in SAP S/4HANA OnPremise

Before configuring TLS 1.3, please make sure your system fits the version and patch requirements as detailed in SAP Note 3318423.

TLS versions can be configured via profile parameters. The following cipher suites are recommended by SAP for maximum interoperability, activating TLS 1.2 - 1.3 on the server (inbound) side, and TLS 1.0 - 1.3 on the client (outbound) side:

 Parameter NameParameter Value
Server (inbound)ssl/ciphersuites1569:PFS:HIGH::EC_X25519:EC_P256:EC_HIGH
Client (outbound)ssl/client_ciphersuites1174:PFS:HIGH::EC_X25519:EC_P256:EC_HIGH

As a note of caution: If your previous inbound configuration included TLS 1.0 - 1.1, please take a look at SAP Note 3346659 for how to safely restart your system after deactivating TLS 1.0 - 1.1.

If you prefer to have your inbound side open to TLS 1.0 - 1.1 as well as TLS 1.2 - 1.3, you can use the following parameter instead of the above one:

 Parameter NameParameter Value
Server (inbound)ssl/ciphersuites1159:PFS:HIGH::EC_X25519:EC_P256:EC_HIGH

If you would like to restrict your outbound communication to TLS 1.2 and 1.3 only, the following values are recommended:

 Parameter NameParameter Value
Client (outbound)ssl/client_ciphersuites1584:PFS:HIGH::EC_X25519:EC_P256:EC_HIGH

Please note that SAP currently does not recommend setting the cipher suite string parameter to TLS 1.2 and 1.3 for the outbound side, as this may cause interoperability issues when trying to communicate with older servers. Especially older embedded devices often do not support TLS 1.2 and upwards. Therefore, please verify that you have no incompatible servers in your system landscape before making such a change. You can read more about how to safely configure restrictive parameters for your system in SAP Note 3346659.

It is also possible to configure TLS 1.3 for specific clients in transaction sm59. For type G or H destinations, go to the tab "Logon & Security" and add your custom cipher suite string value in the field "TLS Cipher Suites".

This approach is especially recommended if you would like to activate TLS 1.3 systemwide, but have specific servers in your landscape which do not support TLS 1.3 and behave erroneously when a client tries to establish a TLS 1.3 connection. In this case, you can disable TLS 1.3 for these specific servers via the configuration shown in the above image.

Please also see the sm59 documentation for more details.

TLS 1.3 in SAP S/4HANA Cloud

TLS 1.3 is activated by default in all SAP S/4HANA Cloud Web Dispatchers. You can read more about it in this article.

Relevant SAP Notes for Further Information

SAP has released several SAP Notes explaining which software versions, patch levels, and configurations are required to enable TLS 1.3 for SAP S/4HANA:

3318423 - Is TLS 1.3 Supported by SAP Kernel for ABAP and SAP S/4HANA?
3346659 - TLS Ciphersuite String Configuration for ABAP and SAP Kernel-Based Systems

Conclusion

The support of TLS 1.3 is a significant leap forward for SAP S/4HANA 2023. It simplifies configurations, enhances security through stronger cipher suites, and ensures the safety of your communication through PFS and a simplified key exchange.

entry.title: Re: SAP Warehouse Operator Version 2.4 - What's new?
entry.content: @wagener-mark Only SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition is officially supported (although technically the app also works with the latest releases of the Private Cloud).

entry.title: Re: How to create BRF+ for SAP21 FI Customer Invoice ?
entry.content: I will post again with detailed information

entry.title: Re: Kyma Capacity Units Calculation
entry.content:
Hi Simon,
This save is only for the dashboard settings.

Any configuration you do on Kyma, I would recommend doing it via Infrastructure as code. That way, it would be easier to regenerate all config. Just a matter of running a pipeline or doing GitOps.

Furthermore, you can use BTP Terraform provider to even automate provisioning of Kyma runtime.

Ref: https://www.linkedin.com/pulse/terraform-sap-btp-above-beyond-christian-lechner-gdf7f/ 

Thanks,

Gaurav

Sunit

entry.title: Re: Shipment number: To set it to external numbering and automatically assign it like internal numbe
entry.content: Since the description was made in Japanese with apologies, it is described again in English.

entry.title: Re: DRF - Business Partner replication - disable confirma...
entry.content: Hello Michael, Thank you for your message. I suspected that the confirmation is important, but I couldn't find any information on it. Especially since all fields within the message are marked as optional. However, we are facing the issue that many messages in srt_moni are in the status "WAIT ON SCHEDULER" and the processing takes a very long time. The idea was to disable the confirmation message and this halving the message load. Do you have any other suggestion for where to start with the configuration of the bgRFC queue to speed up the processing? Best regards, Stefan

entry.title: Re: Shipment number: To set it to external numbering and automatically assign it like internal numbe
entry.content: We are currently considering developing a system where the number range is set to an external number during shipment registration (T-cd: VT01N) and the number is automatically assigned like an internal number. Therefore, we would like to ask the following questions to the experts.

entry.title: Re: Inquiry About Free Trials for SAP ERP Integration with Boomi
entry.content: Hi Deepan, I am also searching the same, I didn't get any info. You got any way to connect with boomi, can you share it please.

entry.title: Re: PDF printing in ABAP - How can I ensure the correct f...
entry.content:
Here is my code:

 

CALL FUNCTION 'ADS_SR_OPEN'
  EXPORTING
    dest    = i_printer
    doctype = 'ADSP'
  IMPORTING
    handle   = handle
    partname = partname.
  
CALL FUNCTION 'ADS_GET_PATH'
  IMPORTING
    ads_path = path.

CONCATENATE path '/' partname '.pdf' INTO file.

OPEN DATASET file FOR OUTPUT IN BINARY MODE.

TRANSFER i_pdf_xstring TO file.

CLOSE DATASET file.

DATA filesize TYPE i.
filesize = xstrlen( i_pdf_xstring ).

CALL FUNCTION 'ADS_SR_CONFIRM'
  EXPORTING
    handle   = handle
    partname = partname
    size     = filesize
    pages    = 1.

CALL FUNCTION 'ADS_SR_CLOSE'
  EXPORTING
    handle = handle.
